title: Inventory Pause
description: Pauses the game whenever the player is in its inventory, chest, shulker or crafting table.
body:
# Inventory Pause (Minecraft Fabric Mod)

Pause your single player game when Inventory is open.

![](https://media.giphy.com/media/mCJQCNkacCMGpUDj3h/giphy.gif)

This is mod is a port of the original mod: [Inventory Pause](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-pause), made by umollu, for 1.20.1.

The game is paused while on inventory, crafting table, shulker or chest.
